_comment: Research brief G-Eval baselines from variant C full 21-case pilot (2026-07-16). Soft-fail only — LLM-judge scores are probabilistic. CI posts a PR comment but does not block merge.
_reason: Planner no-title-anchor + multi-query expansion + chunk fallback + gap strip partial + rubric v2. avg=0.744 (+0.139 vs A, +0.229 vs B_old). 17/21 improved vs A, 20/21 improved vs B_old.
